name: zfmv_script_begin_at_time
description: zFMV_Script::BeginAtTime snapshots the Win32 millisecond tick count, converts it to seconds, and forwards to BeginCurrentAction.
known_limits: The smoke verifies that the time wrapper reaches the current-action begin path, stores a non-negative start time, and initializes the FMV sample set. The exact timeGetTime value is provider/runtime-dependent.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the FMV script source cluster and x87 conversion code shape.
